definition.balls_faced: balls faced by the batter in the innings (wides excluded, no-balls counted)
definition.dismissed: 1 if a real dismissal of this batter fell (retired hurt/out excluded)
definition.entry_ball: legal-ball index of the innings at entry (wides and no-balls excluded); openers enter at 0
definition.entry_event: first delivery as striker or non_striker
definition.match_index: row into matches.json (== point-stream match order)
definition.position: derived batting position = order of entry (openers 1,2 striker-first)
definition.rrr: required run rate at entry, chases only (innings 2 with a target): (target.runs - score) x 6 / (target.overs x 6 - entry_ball); null otherwise
definition.runs: runs.batter scored by the batter in the innings
definition.wickets: wickets fallen before entry (retired hurt/out not counted)
